description:
attached_molecule: bd-wisp-4eq8
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-03T07:12:07Z
dispatched_by: unknown

Four functions in internal/storage/dolt/dependencies.go build unbounded IN clauses that cause pathological Dolt query planning with 600+ issues:

1. GetBlockingInfoForIssues
2. getIssuesByIDsDolt  
3. getDependencyRecordsForIssuesDolt
4. GetDependencyCounts

queryBatchSize=200 is already defined in queries.go but these 4 functions do NOT use it. Each must be refactored to batch its IN clause into chunks of 200.

Reference fix exists on branch fix/batch-dependency-queries in /tmp/beads-fix/internal/storage/dolt/dependencies.go — use as reference, do not copy blindly.
notes: Duplicate of bd-xpb. Fixed upstream in PR #2294.
title: Batch IN-clause queries in 4 functions in dependencies.go

description:
attached_molecule: bd-wisp-92i6
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-03T05:57:08Z
dispatched_by: unknown

GetBlockingInfoForIssues, getIssuesByIDsDolt, getDependencyRecordsForIssuesDolt, and GetDependencyCounts all build unbounded IN clauses. With 600+ issues, these generate queries with hundreds of placeholders causing pathological Dolt query planning. Fix: batch into chunks of 200 (matching queryBatchSize in queries.go). Working fix on branch fix/batch-dependency-queries in /tmp/beads-fix needs PR upstream.
notes: Fixed upstream in PR #2294 (steveyegge/beads). Fork synced.
title: Batch IN-clause queries in dependencies.go to prevent CPU stampede
